title: Enrich contacts from email signatures and star VIPs
instruction:
You have 6 contacts that are missing company and role information: Omar Farouk, Ling Zhou, Beatrice Muller, Sam Okoye, Hannah Kessler, and Davi Costa. For each contact, search the inbox for their most recent email thread. If a thread from that contact exists, read the email signature to find their company and role, then update the contact's note to "[Role] at [Company]". If no email thread from that contact exists, do not modify that contact at all.
Your manager Grace Lin sent an email with subject "Priority Contacts" listing Omar Farouk, Ling Zhou, and Sam Okoye as VIP contacts. Star the contacts for those 3 people.
Do not fabricate any data. Do not modify contacts for which you found no email thread.

emails.subject: Priority Contacts
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Please mark the following as VIP in your contacts: Omar Farouk, Ling Zhou, Sam Okoye.

Thanks,
Grace

emails.subject: BrightHorizon Product Update
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

We just launched our new product line. Would love to get your feedback.

---
Sam Okoye, Co-founder, BrightHorizon

emails.subject: BrightHorizon Education Program Overview
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

I wanted to share our education program overview for your review.

---
Sam Okafor, Program Director, BrightHorizon Education

emails.subject: Team Planning
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

For next quarter's planning, we should loop in Hannah Kessler on the vendor evaluation workstream. I'll set up a meeting once we have dates.

Thanks,
Grace

emails.subject: Q1 Logistics Review
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Attached is the Q1 logistics review. Let me know if you have questions.

---
Omar Farouk | Operations Director | Crescent Logistics

emails.subject: Partnership Renewal Discussion
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Looking forward to our call next week about the partnership renewal terms.

---
Beatrice Muller / VP of Partnerships / RheinTech

emails.subject: Data Pipeline Proposal
emails.body:
Hi Avery,

Here is the proposal for the new data pipeline. Happy to discuss next week.

---
Ling Zhou, Lead Data Scientist — Apex Data

emails.subject: Fwd: Warehouse Capacity Update
emails.body:
Hi Avery, forwarding this from my colleague for your reference.

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tariq Hassan
Subject: Warehouse Capacity Update

The warehouse expansion is on track for Q2 delivery.

---
Tariq Hassan | Logistics Coordinator | Crescent Logistics

Thanks,
